title: Inductive Lodestone
description: Makes Lodestone recipe avaiable in early-midgame.
body:
Replaces vanilla lodestone crafting recipe that includes netherite to the more midgame friendly crafting recipe that uses copper block and redstone torch. 
Just imagine someone has hidden inductor inside some chiselled stone bricks.

![Recipe that datapack adds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c4061f66ff1920915e2107831872ab8b0ae4254a.png)

### Does not remove corresponding advancement in the nether tab
